70447.title: Keep Mum
70447.description: A woman's psyche is explored as she is pushed beyond the limits of sanity.

70448.title: A Quiet Room In Walthamstow
70448.description: When a young woman moves to a room in London, she must figure out what is behind the strange happenings in her new house share before she becomes a victim of the mysterious presence living upstairs.

70449.description: A film producer recruits six students to conduct an experiment to determine whether supernatural forces can truly manifest themselves when playing with a new board game.

70451.title: Cat & Mouse
70451.description: A determined cat chases an elusive mouse while jazz music plays.

70452.title: The Butterfly, The Harp, And The Timepiece
70452.description: A vagabond, an office worker and a former executive grasp for hope in their waning dreams through sentimental treasures at a magical pawn shop, but unlikely circumstances bind their paths together in a culmination of fulfilment and disappointment.

70453.title: Deathless
70453.description: British private investigator John Ray tracks Max Serloom, who has kidnapped John's wife, and only one of them will live through their confrontation in a deserted warehouse in London.

70454.description: An architect toys with a lump of sugar as he visualises in his mind's eye his next project.

70459.title: An Orgy In Joshua Tree
70459.description: A nervous guy is invited to a weekend in Joshua Tree with three couples, terrified and intrigued that he may have been invited to an orgy.

70460.description: In our commitment to providing a platform for all filmmakers, we're showcasing a collection of films made by and starring filmmakers of colour, in projects that prove just how imaginative and inclusive shorts can be.

70499.title: Shells
